Add the Spinach in the last 5 minutes of simmering to soften it.
Puree or mash the mixture to a fine Jelly Stew consistency suitable for cats.
Stir in the Flaxseed Oil to provide essential omega fatty acids.
Allow the meal to cool to room temperature before serving to your cat.
